headlines.h: Opinion: When your cat grandma bakes you cookies and gives you this look (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: Markets React To: My neighbor's cat regularly comes over to disapprove of us
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: BREAKING: “Took a selfie with my cat and made a meme out of it. Feel free to use the blank template 😉”

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: took a photo herself☺️
